TextView.android:text: (Text Will Chenged as Required) Our Secure EHR System is designed to protect patient medical records with advanced encryption and strict access control mechanisms. By implementing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), only authorized users such as doctors, hospitals, and patients can access relevant data. Blockchain-based verification ensures data integrity and prevents unauthorized tampering. Secure cloud integration allows real-time, anytime access while maintaining privacy. Automated audit logs monitor all activities, ensuring transparency, compliance, and trust in modern digital healthcare systems.
